title: The One Fair Value Gap Filter That Actually Works (2026)
description: Not all Fair Value Gaps are worth trading. We were taking every single one — and it was destroying our accounts. Then the R2F Trading system revealed the one filter that separates the setups worth taking from the traps. This changed everything. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT concepts, smart money setups, and funded trader strategies.
script: I took every Fair Value Gap I saw. Every single one. Blew three funded accounts in 90 days. The gap wasn't the problem. I was missing one filter. Most traders treat all FVGs the same. They're not. 80% are traps. The only ones worth trading sit inside a displacement move — with liquidity swept above or below first. No liquidity sweep before the FVG? Skip it. Every time. That one rule cut our losing trades in half. The R2F Trading system calls it the displacement confirmation filter. Stop gambling on random gaps. Follow R2F Trading. We post real setups, real filters, every single day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
